title: malpighia verruculosa subsp. antillana
intro: Malpighia verruculosa subsp. antillana, also known as the Antillean Mammee or Jamaican Mammee, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malpighiaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Malpighia verruculosa subsp. antillana include its ability to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its potential to support cardiovascular health and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and ointments for topical application.
